title: useAutoScroll
description: Auto-scroll helper for drag-and-drop interactions. When the pointer approaches the top or bottom edge of a scrollable container, it automatically scrolls at a speed proportional to the distance from the edge.

api.handleAutoScroll: Call with the pointer's `clientY` while dragging. Starts/stops auto-scroll based on proximity to container edges.
api.stopAutoScroll: Immediately cancel any ongoing auto-scroll animation.

playground.instruction: Move your pointer near the top or bottom edge of the box below while holding the mouse button to see auto-scroll.
